summary: No clear information on recording quality or show performance; reviewer only notes NRPS set confusion
review: The sole review does not comment on the Dead's performance or the audio source, focusing instead on a possible mix‑up with the New Riders of the Purple Sage set. Consequently there is insufficient data to assess either the musical or technical aspects of this recording.
